homework.subject: English - Novel Assessment (Of Mice and Men)
homework.description: Part 1: Submit minimum 2 meaningful annotations per page from the novel (annotations may include interesting vocabulary, figurative language, literary devices, symbols, themes, questions, predictions, connections, and personal reflections). Part 2: Create a creative presentation (PowerPoint or Chart) including: brief summary, main characters, major themes, timeline of key events, favourite scene/quotation with explanation, and personal reflection. Upload PPTs in the Assignment in English teams closer to due date.

events.name: Indian Academic Championship (INDAC) 2026-27 — Online Regional Qualifying Exam (ORQE)
events.details: Free first round. Students need to score 50% or above to advance to Regionals. Competitions include History Bee, Geography Bee, Science Bee, and History Bowl. Top performers can qualify to represent India at Asian Academic Championships in Thailand or International History Olympiad in Berlin, Germany.

homework.subject: Humanities
homework.description: Biome Research project - Complete table for chosen biome (Desert, Forest, Grassland, or Tundra) with climate, location, plants, animals, and adaptations. Answer critical thinking questions in complete sentences. Create labeled drawings of one plant and one animal with adaptations. Write 4-5 sentence reflection on which biome you would visit and why.

homework.subject: Humanities
homework.description: Complete homework on Exploring the Biomes of Asia in Humanities notebook. Part A: Answer questions about four main biomes (Tropical Rainforest, Desert, Taiga, Tundra) - which is hottest, coldest, receives most rainfall, and which would you like to learn more about. Part B: Write 2-3 sentences imagining an adventure to one biome. Challenge: Draw one biome and label two things you would find there.

homework.subject: Humanities
homework.description: Complete homework in Humanities notebook. Write date and title: The Four Major Biomes of Asia. Write name of each biome as heading. Answer both Critical Thinking and Think and Reflect questions for each biome in complete sentences, 2-3 sentences per answer. Do only 2 questions of the Biome you are working on in class (Tropical Rainforest, Desert, Taiga, or Tundra). May research the topic if needed.

homework.subject: Hindi
homework.description: भाग – A : रिक्त स्थान भरिए (Fill in the blanks with correct pronouns). भाग – B : संज्ञा के स्थान पर सर्वनाम लिखिए (Replace nouns with pronouns). भाग – C : सही सर्वनाम पर ✔ लगाइए (Mark correct pronouns). भाग – D : वाक्य बनाइए (Make sentences with given pronouns). चुनौती प्रश्न: नीचे दिए गए अनुच्छेद में सर्वनाम शब्दों को घेरिए (Circle pronouns in the given paragraph).

events.name: Contentio Mathematica – Preliminary Round (Grade 5)
events.details: Mathematics quiz for Grades 1 to 5. Questions based on topics covered in previous grade level and current grade up to 15 Jul 2026. Syllabus includes: Previous Grade – Unit 2 (2D shapes and patterns), Unit 6 (3D shapes), Unit 7 (Fractions, decimals and percentages), Unit 11 (Multiplication and division), Unit 16 (Time), Unit 17 (Number and the Laws of Arithmetic). Current Grade – Unit 1 (The Number system), Unit 2 (Numbers and Sequences), Unit 4 (Addition and Subtraction -1). Semi-finalists and finalists will represent their House in Grand Finale.
events.preparation: Revise all listed units and topics

events.name: Contentio Mathematica – Grand Finale (Grade 5)
events.details: Grand Finale for semi-finalists and finalists from Preliminary Round. Winners will represent their House.
